name: Roar of the Blue-Eyed Dragons
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>青</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>轟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>臨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Roaring Descent of the Blue-Eyed Dragons
desc: Special Summon in Defense Position, 1 "Blue-Eyes" monster from your Deck, GY, or banishment (but if you control no "Blue-Eyes White Dragon", you can only Special Summon "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" with this effect), also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Dragon monsters. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field, including a "Blue-Eyes" monster. You can only use 1 "Roar of the Blue-Eyed Dragons" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Special Summon in Defense Position, 1 "Blue-Eyes" monster from your Deck, GY, or banishment (but if you control no "Blue-Eyes White Dragon", you can only Special Summon "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" with this effect), also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Dragon monsters. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field, including a "Blue-Eyes" monster. You can only use 1 "Roar of the Blue-Eyed Dragons" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Advent of the Eyes of Blue
Structure Deck: Advent of the Eyes of Blue Legendary Majesty Inheritance Pack

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
